Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are posters regarding traffic safety[n]and reminders of recent crimes in the area.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the bulletin board with details[n]about the missing people.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The missing person was found with Apathy[n]Syndrome. I didn't rescue them in time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems there is no one missing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Information of a new missing person[n]has been posted on the bulletin board...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are missing people who[n]haven't been rescued yet...[n]{f 1 1}
